lore.english:
Taimanin. Fire Artist specializing in ranged attacks. Rowdy and oppressive, when she sees someone who is weak and lacks confidence, she gets mad and acts harshly toward them.

She uses a six-barrel Gatling Gun as her weapon, developed by both Section Three and the Research Institute of Anti-demon Science. The magazine is loaded with flaming bullets containing compressed Particles. It can fire as many as 4000 rounds per minute, and can also fire a laser cannon by charging the Particles, but the weight and severe recoil make it impossible to fire while moving. When the magazine runs out of ammunition during battle, it must be reloaded and refilled with her own Particles.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Fire Art: Demon Machine Gun[-]
skills.description:
Fires both Gatling Guns at the enemy, attacking a total of 14 times.
Each time target is engulfed in flames, they are inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:570102]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:570102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:570102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Burning Grit[-]
skills.description:
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]80%[-], [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:570301]%[-].
If the target's [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]40%[-], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:570302]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
skills.description_readable:
If the target's [&HP] is less than 80%, [&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [V3:570301]%.
If the target's [&HP] is less than 40%, performs a ([V3:570302]%) [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
